OncReg 0.17.9
  • Reference

Arithmetic mean with NA removal or NA if no valid entries

Source: R/OncReg.summary.R
OR.mean.Rd

Equivalent to mean(x, na.rm = TRUE) except returns NA (rather than NaN) if all elements are NA.

Usage

OR.mean(x)

Arguments

x

Numeric vector.

Value

Maximum of non-NA elements or NA if none exist.

See also

Other summary: OR.max(), OR.min(), OR.rowleft(), OR.rowmax(), OR.rowmax.threshold(), OR.rowmin(), OR.rowmin.threshold(), OR.sum()
